appSubtitle: Download your favorite videos and playlists with ease.
urlPlaceholder: Paste YouTube video or playlist link...
modeNotSelected: Select a mode above to unlock
playlistWarning: If you want to download a playlist, switch to 'Normal Playlist' mode. This page only downloads single videos; the playlist link was converted to a single video.
notPlaylistError: This is not a playlist link! Please enter a valid playlist link or use Single Mode.
mixPlaylistError: YouTube Mix/Radio playlists cannot be downloaded. Please use a regular playlist link (e.g. youtube.com/playlist?list=PL...).
errorInvalidUrl: Please enter a valid YouTube URL.
aboutP1: Unlike ordinary downloaders, this app was engineered to perfectly organize your music library in studio quality.
aboutF1Desc: The songs you download aren't just bare files. The system uses FFmpeg to permanently burn Artist, Album, Genre, and Year into ID3 tags. Your car stereo will thank you.
aboutF2Desc: When you download a playlist or an album, each track is assigned its original Track Number in order. Your music files will never overlap or play randomly.
aboutF3Desc: You can replace classic wide YouTube thumbnails with square (1:1) Spotify-style cover arts of your choice before exporting.
